title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 534.370 - Form of execution against defendant
text:
534.370.  Form of execution against defendant. — Executions against defendants shall contain a clause of restitution, and, in other respects, conform to the judgment, and may be in the following form:
(RSMo 1939 § 2851, A.L. 1945 p. 1089, A.L. 1978 H.B. 1634) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 2465; 1919 § 3013; 1909 § 7675 
Effective 1-02-79
